name: Tomoe Gozen
description: Her years of birth and death are unknown. An individual from the late Heian/early Kamakura periods. The beloved concubine of Kiso no Yoshinaka (Minamoto no Yoshinaka), the famous general who earned the title of Sei-i Taishōgun and was defeated by Minamoto no Yoritomo. Constantly by Yoshinaka’s side, a brave woman who frequently accomplished military achievements. Excelling in military prowess, she was famed as a mighty warrior. The daughter of Nakahara no Kanetō, the younger sister of Higuchi Ka

name: Yasuko Kouenji
description: She is a student and mangaka. She is the next door neighbor of Kuroto Nakano and Senko-San. Spoiler: ~!Later, Shiro comes to her place and begins pampering her similar to how Senko-San pampers Nakano.!~

name: Yu-Jin Han
description: __Age__: 30 (pre-regression), 25 (post-regression) Han Yu-Jin is a stat F-rank Hunter. He dedicates his childhood to raising his younger brother Han Yu-Hyeon. When Yu-Hyeonn eventually Awakens as an S-rank Hunter and later sacrifices himself to save his brother's life, Han Yu-Jin goes back in time to prevent his death.

name: Yukiji Setoguchi
description: The only female member of Kenji's original group of friends, and also the strongest physically. Yukiji currently (at the beginning of the story) serves as a drug dog handler for Narita Airport. Takes care of Kanna in the year 2014.

name: Zebra
description: One of the "Four Heavenly Kings" he is in jail for an as of now unknown crime. He is said to be the best at disrupting IGO's food order. name: Komoe Tsukuyomi
description: Despite her childish and very short (135 cm) appearance, she is actually an adult and one of Tōma's teachers. This is proven by her apartment being littered with beer cans and cigarettes. She also contradicts her age by acting childish to her students, having a child-like crush on Tōma, and ending her sentences with desu, something a child usually does. This irony means that she is often regarded as one of the seven great mysteries of Academy City. She has major interest in studying pyrokinesis

description: Takani Megumi (高た荷かに 恵めぐみ?) is a secondary character in the Rurouni Kenshin series and the main cast's primary physician after her appearance. During the Boshin Wars, her father died and the rest of her family went missing, leaving Megumi as the sole survivor.
